title: staelia reflexa
intro: Staelia reflexa is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the 'Brazilian coral tree' due to its vibrant coral-like flowers. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits associated with Staelia reflexa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as an antispasmodic. In herbal preparations, Staelia reflexa is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
